caption: The video captures a group of individuals, likely part of a professional sports team, as they prepare for travel. Initially, several men dressed in formal suits and ties, all wearing face masks, are seen exiting a building. They walk confidently down a set of stairs, heading towards a parking area. The scene then transitions to show a larger group of people, presumably athletes, also wearing masks and casual attire, walking towards a large bus. Some carry bags, indicating they are ready for a trip. The setting is sunny and outdoors, with clear skies and a well-maintained facility in the background, suggesting an organized and professional environment. The presence of security personnel further emphasizes the importance of the event or journey they are embarking on.
